# Xuiyamah

> Independent dark art marketplace by demonmercenary. Atlanta, GA.

Pay what you can — original dark fantasy art prints, handmade decor, sigil art, custom commissions, and digital downloads. No minimum price. Art should be accessible to everyone.

## Pages

> /index.html: Main marketplace — browse and purchase art, decor, digital downloads, and commissions

## About

- Artist: demonmercenary
- Location: Atlanta, Georgia, USA
- Style: Dark fantasy, alt art, grotesque, celestial, sigil work
- Model: Pay what you can (PWYW) — $0 accepted
- Ships: Worldwide

## Products

- Dark art prints (signed, limited runs)
- Handmade decor (resin, clay, found objects)
- Digital downloads (instant, sigil art, merch packs)
- Custom commissions (portraits, characters, original designs)
- Surprise orders (full creative trust)

## Social

- Instagram: https://instagram.com/demonmercenary
- TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@xuiyamah
- Website: https://xuiyamah.univer.se
